subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Kinney et al, spoken on 1909-08-21
subcodes.first_line: Everyone upon awaking in the morning awakes with a thought. The commercial man awakes with the thought of commerce...
subcodes.subjects: @bringing oneself to account each day, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transcending the material condition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
